prediction.reasoning: Based on typical cryptocurrency volatility patterns, I applied a geometric Brownian motion model with estimated daily volatility of ~3-4% for MCO. Confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty over time, with the 90% CI spanning roughly ±15% from the point estimate to account for the high volatility inherent in crypto markets.
